module.title: Check status of NSClient++
module.description: Use this module to check the health and status of NSClient++ it self
module.name: CheckNSCP

check_nscp.description: Check the internal health of NSClient++.

check_nscp_version.description: Check the version of NSClient++ which is used.

check_nscp_update.description: Check if there is a newer version of NSClient++ available on GitHub. The result is cached (default 24 hours) to avoid hitting the GitHub API rate limit.
